title: N-PAMP Profile Registry
description: Schema for the JSON representation of registries/profiles.csv: an array of row objects, one per security profile. The code column is an 8-bit profile code (2 hex digits). On/Off toggle columns are constrained to their observed token sets. Wrong-format code, out-of-enum profile/toggle, missing column, and empty free-text columns are caught here; DUPLICATE profile or code values are caught by the companion validate-registries.py.

code.description: 8-bit profile code, hex-prefixed, exactly 2 hex digits (e.g. 0x01).

min_kem.description: Minimum required hybrid KEM suite name (e.g. X25519MLKEM768); MUST be non-empty.

allowed_signatures.description: Comma-separated allowed signature algorithms; MUST be non-empty.

kdf_hash.description: Negotiated KDF hash for this profile.

per_frame_aead_diversification.description: Whether per-frame AEAD key diversification is mandatory.

downgrade_refusal.description: Downgrade-refusal policy (Off, or a 'Refuses ...' clause); MUST be non-empty.

mandatory_key_update.description: Mandatory key-update policy for this profile; MUST be non-empty.

summary.description: One-line summary of the profile; MUST be non-empty.
